mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_history (user_no, keyword, result_cnt) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{keyword}, #{resultCnt})
mapper.select: SELECT search_no AS searchNo, user_no AS userNo, keyword AS keyword, result_cnt AS resultCnt, search_date AS searchDate FROM search_history WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY search_date DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT keyword, COUNT(*) AS searchCnt, MAX(search_date) AS lastSearched FROM search_history GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY searchCnt DESC LIMIT 10
